title: Senior Doctor - Metropolis Healthcare - 2025 Hiring Drive

jsonLd.title: Senior Doctor - Metropolis Healthcare - 2025 Hiring Drive
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Senior Doctor looking for your next big career move? Metropolis Healthcare in Patna offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Metropolis Healthcare:
Metropolis Healthcare is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Maintain accurate clinical documentation in electronic health records
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Attend continuing medical education programs and training

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Medical Ethics
• Proficiency in ICU Management
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in Diagnostic Skills
• Proficiency in Clinical Research
• Proficiency in Surgical Procedures
• Proficiency in Health Informatics

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Life and accident insurance
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Patna, Bihar, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Metropolis Healthcare!
